channel.title: Pages on William Zujkowski's Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on William Zujkowski's Personal Website

item.title: Links
item.description:
Curated Links

  • International Association of Exorcists: Supporting Catholic exorcists in their spiritual work.
  • Centauri Dreams: Paul Gilster’s blog on deep space exploration and interstellar travel.
  • Center for PostNatural History: A museum dedicated to organisms transformed by human influence.
  • Paperclip AI Game: A quirky game about making paperclips.
  • Learn X in Y Minutes: Quick programming language tutorials.
  • Museum of Obsolete Media: An online museum preserving obsolete audio, video, and data formats.
  • International Space Elevator Consortium: Advocating the development of a space elevator.
  • The Kid Should See This: Curated educational videos covering science, art, and more.
  • Acme Kleinbottles: Purchase a mathematical curiosity.
  • Orion’s Arm Universe Project: A collaborative project envisioning a future with advanced AI and technology.
  • Set Up Your Own LTE Network: A DIY tutorial for building your own LTE network.
  • The Pudding: Data visualizations that tell engaging cultural stories.
  • The Public Domain Review: Curated art, literature, and ideas from the public domain.
  • Radio Garden: Listen live to radio stations worldwide via an interactive globe.
  • The Tau Zero Foundation: Exploring the science behind interstellar travel.
  • The Website is Down: Hilariously insightful IT videos.
  • Zombo.com: Where endless possibilities await.
